semantic_invariants.email: Unicode case-insensitive equality implemented with JavaScript toLowerCase, with both exact captured values reasserted inside the D1 batch
semantic_invariants.accept_role: case-insensitive admin remains admin; owner, member variants, and invalid roles normalize to member
semantic_invariants.accept_existing_member: preserve existing membership and do not allocate a second member NanoID or paid seat
semantic_invariants.accept_paid_seat: when owner has a direct subscription, allocate only while hosted Cap quota remains; self-hosted mode is unlimited
semantic_invariants.accept_user: merge organizationSetup/customDomain/inviteTeam=true, select active organization, set default only when absent, and inherit owner subscription only with a paid seat
semantic_invariants.decline_cleanup: remove organization space memberships before membership, retain member NanoID history, select a deterministic remaining organization, and clear inherited subscription only when no other paid seat exists
semantic_invariants.invite: both successful decisions delete the source invite and atomically resolve its lossless alias

one_transaction: live actor, organization, invite alias, plaintext invite email, and source role reassertion
invite deletion and immutable alias resolution
atomicity.rollback: no partial membership, seat, onboarding, pointer, invite, alias, receipt, or audit mutation
atomicity.source_retry: no idempotency key; after a committed decision the deleted invite makes a retry return 404
